title: Monthly Updates - March 2026
description: Explore the most important March developments across major ecosystems — from enterprise adoption and tokenized finance to agent infrastructure, governance evolution, and performance improvements.

news.title: edgeX Launches EDGE Chain on Arbitrum for High-Performance Trading
news.content:
Arbitrum [announced](https://blog.arbitrum.io/edgex-announces-edge-chain-on-arbitrum/) that edgeX is launching EDGE Chain, an app-specific rollup designed to support high-speed global trading across crypto, equities, and derivatives markets.

The chain is optimized for institutional-grade workloads with a modular architecture separating trading execution from standard DeFi operations. It will integrate native USDC and CCTP through a partnership with Circle, enabling seamless cross-chain liquidity and institutional on/offramps.

news.title: Arbitrum Shows Improved Fee Stability with Dynamic Pricing Upgrade
news.content:
Arbitrum [published](https://blog.arbitrum.io/predictability-at-peak-demand/) new data on its Dynamic Pricing mechanism, highlighting improved fee predictability under real mainnet congestion.

Results show 98% lower peak gas spikes, faster fee recovery, and the ability to handle significantly higher throughput while keeping fees stable — reinforcing Arbitrum’s positioning as infrastructure for high-volume, production-grade applications.

news.title: Simcluster Launches AI-Native Social App on Arbitrum
news.content:
Arbitrum [announced](https://x.com/arbitrum/status/2029600514325811646) the launch of Simcluster, an AI-native social application combining content creation, gameplay, and tokenized IP into a single onchain experience.

The launch reinforces Arbitrum’s role as a hub for emerging AI-driven and consumer-facing applications.

news.title: WalletConnect Pay SDK Goes Live on Arbitrum
news.content:
WalletConnect [announced](https://x.com/WalletConnect/status/2031445073154683380) that its WalletConnect Pay SDK is now live globally, enabling crypto payments directly on Arbitrum.

The integration allows merchants to accept stablecoin and wallet-based payments through existing infrastructure, positioning Arbitrum as a production-ready payment rail.

news.title: Arbitrum Advances Security Council Elections
news.content:
Arbitrum Governance [launched](https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/march-2026-security-council-election-nominee-selection/30682) the nominee selection phase for the March 2026 Security Council elections.

The 12-member council is responsible for handling critical upgrades and emergency decisions across the protocol.

news.title: Arbitrum Highlights Institutional Growth in 2025 Transparency Report
news.content:
Arbitrum [published](https://x.com/arbitrum/status/2033921637993607475) its 2025 Transparency Report, highlighting deployments from institutions such as Robinhood, Franklin Templeton, and WisdomTree.

The report also emphasizes progress across developer programs, ArbOS upgrades, Stylus adoption, and DAO governance.

news.title: Arbitrum Joins Mastercard’s Crypto Partner Program
news.content: Arbitrum [announced](https://x.com/arbitrum/status/2034308009065603260) its participation in Mastercard’s Crypto Partner Program, aiming to connect onchain infrastructure with global payment networks.

news.title: Arbitrum Launches Mentorship Program for Robinhood Chain Builders
news.content:
Arbitrum [announced](https://x.com/arbitrum/status/2034737958016958468) a mentorship program supporting early-stage teams building on Robinhood Chain, offering up to $100K in rewards.

The initiative focuses on accelerating development of financial applications aligned with Robinhood’s onchain strategy.

news.title: MoonPay OWS Brings AI Agent Wallet Infrastructure to Arbitrum
news.content:
Arbitrum [announced](https://x.com/ArbitrumDevs/status/2036383026586984892) support for MoonPay’s Onchain Wallet Stack (OWS), enabling AI agents to manage wallets, store keys, and sign transactions directly onchain.

The integration expands the design space for autonomous applications.

news.title: Arbitrum Restores Sepolia After Temporary Halt
news.content:
Arbitrum [reported](https://x.com/ArbitrumDevs/status/2036153112042586428) a temporary pause in Sepolia block production due to a Nitro-related issue, which was later [resolved](https://x.com/ArbitrumDevs/status/2036213399684784571).

The team confirmed no user funds were at risk and announced further improvements to network stability.

news.title: Five U.S. Regional Banks Move to ZKsync Through Cari Network
news.content:
ZKsync [announced](https://www.zksync.io/blog/cari-selects-zksyncs-prividium) that Cari Network is building a tokenized deposit system with five U.S. regional banks representing over $600B in deposits.

Using Prividium, the network enables programmable settlement while keeping deposits under existing regulatory oversight.

news.title: ZKsync Partners with BitGo for Tokenized Deposits
news.content:
ZKsync [announced](https://x.com/zksync/status/2036903630146510918) a partnership with BitGo to deliver infrastructure for issuing and managing tokenized deposits.

The solution combines Prividium with institutional custody and wallet services to support compliant financial workflows.

news.title: ZKsync Launches Capped Minter V3
news.content:
ZKsync deployed Capped Minter V3, upgrading token governance for Token Program Proposals (TPPs).

The update introduces transferable admin rights and updatable minting sources, improving flexibility and continuity for token programs.

news.title: GRVT Introduces Unified Margin on ZKsync
news.content:
GRVT, a ZK chain within the Elastic Network, [introduced](https://x.com/zksync/status/2039121320714371144) a unified margin model enabling users to operate with a single shared collateral pool.

This improves capital efficiency across markets while leveraging ZKsync’s scalable infrastructure.

news.title: ZKsync Publishes ZARP v1 Retrospective
news.content:
ZKsync [published](https://forum.zknation.io/t/zarp-v1-retrospective-zip-audit-reimbursement-program-zarp/933) the closeout report for ZARP v1, a $5M audit reimbursement program.

The report highlights $2.7M reimbursed and identifies governance timing mismatches, informing improvements introduced in ZARP v2.

news.title: Optimism Introduces End-to-End Benchmarking Framework
news.content:
Optimism [published](https://www.optimism.io/blog/benchmarking-the-op-stack) a benchmarking framework focused on real-world performance across full devnets.

The approach prioritizes sustained workload capacity and bottleneck identification rather than peak throughput metrics.

news.title: Bitpanda Launches Vision Chain on OP Enterprise
news.content:
Optimism [announced](https://www.optimism.io/blog/bitpanda-launches-vision-chain-as-the-first-fully-managed-op-enterprise-chain) Vision Chain, a fully managed OP Stack chain for European institutional finance.

The chain will support tokenized assets, MiCA-compliant stablecoins, and same-day withdrawals via ZK proofs.

news.title: Optimism Executes First OP Buyback
news.content:
Optimism [confirmed](https://gov.optimism.io/t/buyback-communication-thread/10588/4?u=manugotsuka) its first OP token buyback funded by Superchain revenue, purchasing 1.57M OP.

The program allocates 50% of revenue to buybacks over 12 months, linking token demand to ecosystem activity.

news.title: Ether.fi Cash Migrates to OP Mainnet
news.content:
Optimism [announced](https://x.com/Optimism/status/2031386470603468828) the migration of Ether.fi Cash to OP Mainnet, bringing over 300K accounts and $160M+ TVL.

The platform now contributes ~55% of Ether.fi’s revenue, highlighting growing adoption of onchain payment products.

news.title: OKX Expands XLayer with ICE Partnership
news.content: Optimism [highlighted](https://x.com/Optimism/status/2031420708837011953) a partnership between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) to bring tokenized equities and futures onchain via XLayer.

news.title: Optimism Joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program
news.content: Optimism [announced](https://x.com/Optimism/status/2031746443619487754) its participation in Mastercard’s Crypto Partner Program, strengthening connections between blockchain infrastructure and global payment networks.

news.title: Apex Group Commits $100B to T-REX Ledger on Polygon
news.content:
T-REX Network, Tokeny, and Polygon Labs [launched](https://polygon.technology/blog/apex-group-commits-100b-in-tokenized-assets-to-t-rex-ledger-new-rwa-compliance-chain-built-with-polygon-cdk) a compliance-focused blockchain using Polygon CDK.

Apex Group plans to tokenize $100B in assets by 2027, leveraging ERC-3643 for regulated financial instruments.

news.title: Polygon Improves Fee Stability with Network Upgrade
news.content:
Polygon [implemented](https://polygon.technology/blog/polygon-just-made-transaction-fees-more-predictable-for-institutions) an upgrade removing artificial capacity limits, enabling the network to operate at 110M gas per block.

This reduces fee volatility and improves predictability for institutional users.

news.title: Polygon Joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program
news.content: Polygon [joined](https://polygon.technology/blog/polygon-is-part-of-the-mastercard-crypto-partner-program) Mastercard’s Crypto Partner Program, connecting blockchain infrastructure with global payment rails.

news.title: Polygon Launches Agent CLI for Onchain AI Economy
news.content:
Polygon [introduced](https://polygon.technology/blog/polygon-launches-an-onchain-toolkit-built-for-the-agent-economy) Agent CLI, enabling AI agents to manage wallets, identity, and transactions onchain.

The toolkit supports ERC-8004 identity and gas abstraction, positioning Polygon for agent-driven applications.

news.title: Polygon Enables Cross-chain Swaps via WhatsApp
news.content: Polygon [announced](https://x.com/0xPolygon/status/2028518129542844638) cross-chain swaps integrated into WhatsApp via Dyad, expanding access to onchain liquidity through familiar interfaces.

news.title: Polygon Activates Lisovo Upgrade
news.content: Polygon [activated](https://x.com/0xPolygon/status/2029256715523506391) the Lisovo upgrade, introducing gas subsidies for agent payments, improved fee tuning, and enhanced network reliability.

news.title: PIP-85 Proposes Priority Fee Redistribution
news.content:
Polygon [introduced](https://x.com/0xPolygonFdn/status/2036832154965901368) PIP-85 to adjust priority fee distribution between validators and stakers.

The proposal responds to increased network usage and aims to align incentives.

news.title: Polygon Enables Free Transactions for Agents
news.content:
Polygon [announced](https://x.com/0xPolygon/status/2029224899118846012) a $1M gas rebate program enabling agents to transact without fees for x402-enabled payments.

The initiative aims to accelerate agentic commerce by removing cost barriers.

news.title: Eigen Foundation Appoints New Executive Director
news.content: The Eigen Foundation [announced](https://x.com/eigenfoundation/status/2032521576386875621) that Ajit Tripathi has joined as Executive Director, while Robert Drost transitions to Senior Advisor.

news.title: EigenCloud Participates in Agent Hackathon
news.content: EigenCloud [announced](https://x.com/eigencloud/status/2034511590310187414) its participation in the Synthesis hackathon, focusing on verifiable compute for agent applications.

news.title: Eigen Labs Hiring Social Media Lead for AI
news.content: Eigen Labs is [hiring](https://x.com/eigen_labs/status/2032614064409686499) a Social Media Lead focused on AI, agents, and verifiable systems.

news.title: EigenCloud Launches AgentKit for Sovereign Agents
news.content:
EigenCloud [introduced](https://x.com/eigencloud/status/2037204321008500947) AgentKit, a toolkit enabling AI agents to manage assets, identity, and payments autonomously.

The system combines verifiable compute, secure execution, and onchain financial primitives.

news.title: Nethermind Highlights Evolving Blockchain Security Landscape
news.content:
Nethermind [outlined](https://www.nethermind.io/blog/blockchain-security-strategic-challenges-now-and-ahead) how security is expanding beyond smart contracts to include ZK systems, infrastructure, and AI-driven components.

The report highlights the need for full-stack security and formal verification.

news.title: Nethermind Hiring Web3 Security Triager
news.content: Nethermind is [hiring](https://x.com/Nethermind/status/2019703925809512500) a Web3 Security Triager focused on validating AI-detected vulnerabilities.

news.title: Nethermind Releases v1.36.1 Update
news.content: Nethermind [announced](https://x.com/Nethermind) v1.36.1, enabling support for the Osaka hard fork on the Chiado testnet.

news.title: Nethermind Joins Mastercard Crypto Partner Program
news.content: Nethermind [announced](https://x.com/Nethermind/status/2032035873668145159) its participation in Mastercard’s Crypto Partner Program.

news.title: Nethermind Showcases AI Security Tool Performance
news.content: Nethermind Security [reported](https://x.com/NethermindSec/status/2032407080498242025) that its AuditAgent detected 67% of vulnerabilities in benchmarks, outperforming baseline models.

news.title: Nethermind Tests Agent-Based Audits on Lido
news.content: Nethermind [conducted](https://x.com/Nethermind/status/2033880278670643475) agent-based audits on Lido contracts, identifying multiple issues validated by human auditors.

news.title: Rollups Node Update Enhances Operational Resilience
news.content:
Cartesi [released](https://github.com/cartesi/rollups-node/releases/tag/v2.0.0-alpha.10) Rollups Node v2.0.0-alpha.10, improving database safety, shutdown behavior, and logging controls.

The update enhances reliability for long-running deployments.

news.title: Cartesi CLI Updates With Latest Core Components
news.content: Recent Cartesi CLI alpha releases (v2.0.0-alpha.32 and 33) integrate the latest Rollups Node, Contracts, and PRT versions, ensuring developers work with the most up-to-date stack.

news.title: Fraud Proof System Release Strengthens Dispute Infrastructure
news.content: Cartesi released PRT v2.1.1, improving bond refunds and reliability of the fraud-proof system while simplifying deployment and configuration.

news.title: DeFi Educational Series Wrap-up
news.content:
Cartesi Dev Advocacy Lead João Garcia completed a DeFi-focused educational series explaining how execution environments impact financial design.

The series highlights how Cartesi enables advanced financial models, floating-point math, and stateful applications using a Linux-based environment while remaining verifiable on Ethereum.
